Landing.metaTitle: DojoTrack — Run your dojo, not your spreadsheets
Landing.metaDescription: All-in-one martial arts club management: student roster, belt progression, class scheduling, QR check-in, Stripe payments, competitions, and sparring pairing. Start free.
Landing.heroSubtitle: DojoTrack brings your roster, belt progression, scheduling, and payments into one mobile-first place — so you can spend less time on admin and more time on the mats.
Landing.heroNote: No credit card required · Free for up to 30 students
Landing.featuresTitle: Built for the way clubs actually run
Landing.featuresSubtitle: From a student's first trial class to their black belt — and every payment, grading, and competition in between.

features.title: Student management
features.desc: A complete roster with families, contact details, medical notes, and one-tap invites.

features.title: Belt progression tracking
features.desc: Visual requirement checklists from white to black across BJJ, Karate, Judo, and more.

features.title: Class scheduling
features.desc: Build a weekly timetable, manage bookings, and track attendance from any device.

features.title: QR check-in
features.desc: Students scan a code on the wall to check themselves into class. No clipboard required.

features.title: Stripe payments
features.desc: Memberships, drop-ins, and exam fees — billed and reconciled automatically via Stripe.

features.title: Competition tracking
features.desc: Log tournament entries, divisions, and medals so the whole club can celebrate wins.

features.title: Sparring pairing
features.desc: Generate fair rounds by belt and avoid repeat matchups — no whiteboard maths.

Landing.pricingTitle: Start free, upgrade when you grow
Landing.pricingSubtitle: Simple plans with no setup fees. Cancel anytime.
Landing.pricingNote: Pro pricing is indicative — billing tiers are finalised at launch.
Landing.planFreeBlurb: Everything a small dojo needs to get organised.
Landing.planProBlurb: For growing clubs that bill online and run gradings.
Landing.testimonialsTitle: Dojo owners run leaner with DojoTrack

testimonials.quote: We moved off three different spreadsheets and a group chat. Now belt requirements, attendance, and payments all live in one place — onboarding a new student takes a minute.
testimonials.name: Marcus Oliveira

testimonials.quote: The QR check-in alone sold my front desk. Parents love seeing their kids' belt progress, and I finally stopped chasing late memberships by hand.
testimonials.name: Aisha Rahman

testimonials.quote: Running gradings used to be a paperwork weekend. DojoTrack tracks every requirement per student and prints the certificates. It pays for itself.
testimonials.name: Kenji Watanabe

Landing.finalCtaTitle: Ready to run your dojo the easy way?
Landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Set up your club in under a minute. It's free to start.
Landing.footerSupports: Supports BJJ, Karate, Judo, Taekwondo & custom belt systems.

Auth.loginSubtitle: We'll text you a one-time code.
Auth.registerSubtitle: Set up your dojo in under a minute.
Auth.errorSetupClub: Could not finish setting up your club.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: A snapshot of your club. Metrics populate once students and classes are added.
Dashboard.noClassesTodayBody: Today's timetable is clear. Check-in counts will appear here on class days.
Dashboard.noExamsBody: Schedule a grading exam to test candidates and award belts.

Settings.title: Club settings
Settings.subtitle: Your club's public profile, contact details, and preferences.
Settings.logoUrlHint: Link to a square image used on your public page and emails.
Settings.noClubSubtitle: Settings appear once you're signed in to a club. Register a club to get started.

Students.title: Students
Students.empty: No students yet. Add your first member to get started.
Students.inviteShare: Share this link to invite a student:
Students.subtitle: Manage your members, contact details, and belt ranks.
Students.emptyBody: Your roster is empty. Add your first member, or share an invite link so they can sign up themselves.
Students.profilesUnavailableBody: Connect a database to see attendance history and streaks.
Students.newMemberSubtitle: Enrol a new member and assign them to a belt rank and family.
Students.placeholderMedicalNotes: Allergies, injuries, or conditions instructors should know about.
Students.errorClipboard: Couldn’t access the clipboard — copy the link manually.
Students.readyToGrade: All requirements met — ready to grade for {belt}.
Students.topOfLadderBody: {name} holds the highest rank — no further belt to work toward.
Students.beltUnavailableBody: Connect a database to track requirements and gradings.
Students.noRequirements: No requirements are defined for {belt} yet.

Classes.title: Classes
Classes.empty: No classes on the timetable yet.
Classes.subtitle: Plan your weekly timetable and track attendance.
Classes.newClassBody: Set up a recurring weekly class. Sessions repeat every week on the day you choose.
Classes.emptyBody: Build your weekly timetable. Add your first class and students will be able to book and check in.
Classes.scanToCheckin: Students scan to check in to the next session.
Classes.qrAppearsLater: The QR code appears once an upcoming session is scheduled.
Classes.notConfiguredBody: Connect a database to view sessions, check students in, and track attendance.

Belts.title: Belt progression
Belts.empty: Belt ranks will appear here once your club's system is set up.
Belts.intro: Define what each rank demands — time on the mat, classes attended, techniques, and competition — then track who's ready to grade.
Belts.settingUp: Setting up your belt ladder… refresh in a moment.
Belts.builtInPreviewHint: Connect a database to configure requirements and grade students. These are the ladders DojoTrack ships with.
Belts.noRequirementsSet: No requirements set for this rank yet. Add them from the <link>Belts</link> page.
Belts.connectDbRequirements: Connect a database to configure requirements and grade students.
Belts.noStudentsBelow: No students are at the rank below yet.
Belts.matrixHint: Tap a technique, competition, or custom cell to cycle it through Not assessed → In progress → Passed. Time and class requirements update automatically.
Belts.examsIntro: Schedule gradings, enter results, and promote students.
Belts.noExamsHint: Schedule your first grading to test candidates and award belts.
Belts.connectDbGradings: Connect a database to schedule gradings and promote students.
Belts.connectDbResults: Connect a database to record results and promote students.
Belts.noCandidatesEntered: No candidates entered for this exam.
Belts.resultsSavedPromoted: Results saved — {count, plural, one {# student promoted} other {# students promoted}}.
Belts.newExamIntro: Pick the belt being tested for; the candidates at the rank below are suggested, with the most-ready pre-selected.
Belts.connectDbSchedule: Connect a database to schedule gradings.
Belts.noPromotableRanks: No promotable belt ranks yet. Set up your ladder on the <link>Belts</link> page first.
Belts.notesExamPlaceholder: Anything candidates should bring or know.
Belts.noStudentsBelowToTest: No students are at the rank below to test.

Payments.title: Payments
Payments.notConfigured: Connect Stripe to start collecting payments.
Payments.subtitle: Membership plans, member billing, and revenue at a glance.
Payments.checkoutSuccess: Checkout complete — the payment will appear once Stripe confirms it.
Payments.checkoutCancelled: Checkout cancelled. No charge was made.
Payments.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe isn't configured yet. Add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY to enable live checkout. You can still set up plans below.
Payments.plansEmpty: No plans yet. Add a membership plan to start billing members.
Payments.membersEmpty: No members on a plan yet. Charge a member to start a subscription.
Payments.notAvailableBody: Connect a database (and Stripe) to set up plans and bill members.

checkout.noPlans: Add an active plan first, then you can charge members.
checkout.connectStripe: Connect Stripe to enable live checkout.

Competitions.title: Competitions
Competitions.subtitle: Track tournaments your students enter and record their results.
Competitions.emptyHint: Add a competition to enter students and log their placements.
Competitions.notConfiguredHint: Connect a database to track competitions and record results.
Competitions.newSubtitle: Log a tournament so you can enter students and record their results.
Competitions.allEntered: Every active student is already entered.
Competitions.noEntriesYet: No students entered yet. Add an entry above to start recording results.

Sparring.title: Sparring
Sparring.subtitle: Auto-pair students for safe, balanced rounds by belt and rotate byes.
Sparring.emptyBody: Start a session, pick who's on the mat, and we'll generate balanced pairings.
Sparring.notConfiguredBody: Connect a database to generate and save sparring pairings.
Sparring.regenerateHint: Re-pair reshuffles the draw and reaches for fresh matchups.
Sparring.setUpSubtitle: Pick who's on the mat and how many rounds. We'll pair by belt, avoid repeats across rounds, and rotate byes.
Sparring.noRoster: No active students to pair. Add students first.

Club.tryClassSubtitle: New to {club}? Your first session is free.
Club.scheduleSoon: Class times are being finalised. Check back soon or book a trial to find a slot that works for you.
Club.instructorsSoon: The teaching team will be listed here soon.
Club.comingSoonTitle: This club page is coming soon
Club.comingSoonBody: Class schedules, disciplines, and a sign-up form will live here once {name} finishes setting up its public profile.
Club.runYourOwn: Run your own club on DojoTrack
Club.ogCta: Book a free trial class on DojoTrack
Club.metaDescription: {name} — class schedules, disciplines, and a free trial booking on DojoTrack.

Email.invitationBody: {club} uses DojoTrack to manage classes, belt progression and payments. Tap below to set up your student profile — it only takes a minute.
Email.invitationOrPaste: Or paste this link into your browser:
Email.receiptBody: Thanks, {name} — we've received your payment to {club}.
Email.receiptKeep: Keep this email as your receipt.
Email.examPassedBody: Congratulations, {name}! You've been promoted to {belt} at {club}. 🥋
Email.examPassedBody2: Your instructors are proud of the work you put in — keep it up.
Email.examFailBody: Hi {name}, thanks for testing for {belt} at {club}. You didn't pass this time, but every grading is a step forward.
Email.examFailBody2: Your instructors will share feedback and the areas to focus on before your next attempt.

join.heading: Join {club}
join.enrolNamed: Fill in your details to enrol <name>{label}</name>.
join.enrolMember: Fill in your details to enrol as a member.
join.successBody: Thanks, {name}. {club} has your details — they'll be in touch about your first class.

accepted.title: This invite has been used
accepted.body: Looks like this link was already claimed. Ask your club for a fresh invite if you still need to sign up.

expired.title: This invite has expired
expired.body: Invite links are valid for a limited time. Ask your club to send you a new one.

not_found.title: Invite not found
not_found.body: We couldn't find this invite. Double-check the link, or ask your club to resend it.

unavailable.title: Invites aren't available yet
unavailable.body: This DojoTrack instance isn't connected to a database yet, so invites can't be validated.

checkin.prompt: {date} — tap your name to check in.
checkin.notAvailableBody: We couldn't find this class session. Double-check the QR code or link, or ask your instructor for help.
checkin.cancelledBody: {class} on {date} isn't running. Check the schedule for the next session.
checkin.noMembers: No members are set up for this club yet. Ask your instructor to add you to the roster.

certificate.unavailableBody: A certificate is issued once the candidate passes their grading.
certificate.title: Certificate of Promotion
certificate.awardedRank: has been awarded the rank of
